title: Incident Audit Record (incident-audit topic)
description: Schema for audit records written to the incident-audit Kafka topic by the agent service after processing an incident.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the audit record was produced

incident_id.description: Unique identifier linking back to the triggering event

failure_type.description: Classified failure type determined by the agent's analysis

edge_site_id.description: Identifier for the edge cluster site where the incident occurred

ai_confidence.description: Model confidence score for the root cause analysis (0.0 to 1.0)

remediation_action.description: Description of the remediation action taken (e.g. restart-nginx, scale-up)

servicenow_ticket.description: ServiceNow ticket ID if the incident was escalated

aap_job_id.description: AAP job ID if an Ansible playbook was executed

total_duration_ms.description: Total time from detection to resolution in milliseconds
